name: developing-ios-apps
description: Develops iOS/macOS apps with XcodeGen, SwiftUI, and SPM, including Apple Developer signing, notarization, and CI/CD pipelines. Use when building iOS/macOS apps, fixing Xcode build failures, deploying to real devices, or configuring CI/CD signing. Triggers on XcodeGen project.yml, SPM dependency issues, code signing errors (Error -25294, keychain mismatch, adhoc fallback, EMFILE, notarization credential conflict), "Library not loaded @rpath", Electron @electron/osx-sign / @electron/notarize, nota
author: daymade
